block_00: Forex on Margin is now available on desktop and Android!
block_03: You’ve been asking — we’ve been developing.
block_04: The IQ Option team is excited to announce the release of our newest trading instrument — Forex on Margin. With this instrument, you can trade the way it's done in the Forex industry. Trade through lot sizes and enhance your potential with margin. The option is already available on desktop, web browser, and Android applications.
block_07: To activate Margin Trading on the desktop application and web browser, simply click ’Enable’ in the balance section of the trading platform.
block_09: To activate Margin Trading on mobile, you need to update the app on
block_11: Once you open the app, a "Margin Trading" popup will show up. Click on the "Enable" button to activate the feature. You can also switch on Margin Trading in the balance selector.
